steps.name: Given  the user is on the SauceDemo login page
And  the user logs in with valid credentials
When  the user adds the first product to the cart
And  the user navigates to the cart

steps.name: When  the user fills in checkout information with "Manoj" "Kumar" ""
Then  a checkout error should be displayed containing "Postal Code is required"
